meaning: adj.鏃犳妧鑳界殑,鏃犳墠鑹虹殑
examples: Betwixt the stars and the unaccomplished fate.
He is an unaccomplished writer with nothing published.
With the fear of the unknown or the unaccomplished also comes the reminder of what it is to be alive.
This is not a dimwit, or an unaccomplished guy, after all.
